title: add infra token rotation workflow (manual trigger, no cron)
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Changing the locks
gist.blurb: Added a new automated workflow for rotating infrastructure tokens. Keeping the hive secure behind the scenes!
gist.summary: Introduced a manual GitHub Actions workflow to securely rotate infrastructure tokens across EC2 and GPU workers.
gist.impact: Maintainers can now safely and easily rotate internal authentication tokens with built-in pre-flight and health checks.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together in a cozy garden shed (server room). The robot is holding a glowing new key (token), while Polly checks a clipboard. Safe, secure, behind-the-scenes maintenance.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a garden shed that doubles as a server room. A cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a glowing golden key, while the bee mascot hovers nearby checking a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
